title: Pillow Block Bearing Housings
content: Pillow block bearing housings (also called plummer blocks) are cast iron or pressed steel housings that mount onto flat surfaces and accept self-aligning ball or roller bearings. Features: split housing design for easy installation without shaft removal, multiple sealing options (labyrinth, contact, non-contact), grease nipple fittings for lubrication, SNL and SNA series available. Applications: conveyors, fans, pumps, gearboxes, agricultural equipment, and general industrial machinery. Anupam Bearings stocks a full range of Timken pillow block housings.

title: SNT Plummer Block Bearing Housing
content: The Timken SNT series plummer block housings are split housing units specifically designed for tapered roller bearing assemblies. Features: heavy-duty cast iron or ductile iron construction, precision-machined bores, built-in end covers with labyrinth seals, oil bath or grease lubrication options, suitable for high loads and shock loading. Available in standard and heavy-duty versions for bore sizes from 1.5 to 8 inches. Applications: steel mills, mining equipment, paper machines, heavy conveyors. Supplied by Anupam Bearings across India.

title: Timken Split Bearing Housings
content: Timken split bearing housings are two-piece designs that allow the housing to be separated without removing the shaft or associated equipment. Features: reduces maintenance downtime significantly, interchangeable with competitor designs, precision bore alignment, available in standard and heavy-duty grades, suitable for Timken spherical roller and cylindrical roller bearings. Applications: cement plants, mining, steel mills, paper mills, power generation, and any critical machinery where downtime is costly. Available from Anupam Bearings.

title: Spherical Roller Solid Block Housings
content: Solid block housings are one-piece cast iron or steel housings for spherical roller bearings in applications requiring maximum rigidity. Features: one-piece construction for highest rigidity, multiple mounting positions (foot, flanged, take-up), sealed variants for contaminated environments, heavy-duty designs for loads up to several tonnes. Applications: heavy industrial machinery, mining crushers, large fans, and high-vibration environments. Supplied by Anupam Bearings.

title: Linear Motion Bearings - LM Bush and Ball Screw
content: Linear motion (LM) bush bearings are precision components for smooth, low-friction linear motion guidance. LM bush bearings feature recirculating ball elements in a cylindrical housing for rolling contact along a ground shaft. Ball screw support units are precision assemblies for mounting ball screws, providing axial rigidity and smooth rotation. Key specs: accuracy class N (normal), H (high), P (precision); available in standard, long (L), and open (UU) types; bore sizes from 6mm to 100mm. Applications: CNC machine tools, robotics, automation equipment, measuring instruments, and 3D printers. Available from Anupam Bearings.

title: Cross Roller Guides and Precision Lock Nuts
content: Cross roller guides use crossed cylindrical rollers arranged alternately at 90 degrees for extremely high rigidity and precision in both radial and axial directions simultaneously. Features: very high moment stiffness, compact design, suitable for high precision and high load applications. Precision lock nuts are used to accurately position bearings on shafts with minimal runout and vibration. Available in metric sizes with locking tabs or deformable elements. Applications: machine tools, semiconductor equipment, and medical devices. Available through Anupam Bearings.

title: Lead Screws for Linear Motion
content: Lead screws (also called power screws) convert rotary motion into linear motion through a threaded shaft and nut system. Compared to ball screws, lead screws are lower cost with higher friction but are self-locking (useful for vertical applications). Features: acme or trapezoidal thread profiles, stainless steel or alloy steel construction, available with anti-backlash nuts, pitch options from 2mm to 20mm. Applications: 3D printers, CNC routers, medical tables, actuators, and laboratory equipment. Available from Anupam Bearings.

title: Power Transmission - Chain and Sprocket Systems
content: Anupam Bearings supplies a full range of power transmission chains and sprockets. Standard roller chains: ANSI/ISO metric and inch, simplex, duplex, and triplex. Special chains: reclaimer chains for bulk material handling, flight chains for vertical conveyors, heavy-duty elevator chains for grain and cement elevators, welded steel chains for heavy industrial drag conveyors. Sprockets: single and multi-strand, standard and large pitch, finished bore or plain bore. Applications: conveyors, hoists, mining, agriculture, food processing, and material handling. Available from Anupam Bearings.

title: V-Belt Pulleys and Timing Belt Drives
content: V-belt drives: classical A, B, C, D, E section belts with matching cast iron and steel pulleys. Narrow V-belts: SPZ, SPA, SPB, SPC for higher power density. Timing belts (synchronous drives): HTD (high torque drive), GT2, and trapezoidal tooth profiles for zero-slip power transmission. Timing pulleys: aluminium, steel, and cast iron with various hub configurations. Features: maintenance-free operation, precise speed ratios, no lubrication required, low noise. Applications: pumps, compressors, HVAC equipment, conveyors, textile machinery. Available from Anupam Bearings.

title: Couplings for Shaft Connection
content: Shaft couplings transmit torque between two shafts while accommodating misalignment. Types available: jaw couplings (flexible, dampens vibration), disc couplings (zero-backlash, high speed), grid couplings (shock-absorbing, heavy duty), rigid couplings (flanged and sleeve types), flexible pin-and-bush couplings. Bore sizes from 10mm to 200mm. Material: cast iron, ductile iron, and steel. Applications: pumps, compressors, gearboxes, motors, and any shaft-to-shaft connection. Available from Anupam Bearings.

title: Groeneveld-BEKA Automatic Lubrication Systems
content: Groeneveld-BEKA supplies reliable automatic lubrication systems for transport, construction, mining, agriculture, and industrial applications. Systems available: single-line progressive systems (divider valve based), dual-line systems (for very long lines), multi-point systems (for many lubrication points), and oil circulation systems. Benefits: extends bearing and component life by ensuring correct lubrication at all times, reduces manual lubrication labor, prevents over- and under-lubrication, suitable for harsh environments. Compatible with grease up to NLGI grade 2 and various oils. Supplied by Anupam Bearings across India.

title: Seals - Oil Seals and Bearing Seals
content: Oil seals (radial shaft seals) prevent lubricant leakage and contamination ingress. Types: single lip, double lip, with and without garter spring, PTFE-lined for chemical resistance. Materials: NBR (nitrile), FKM (Viton) for high temperature, PTFE for chemical environments. Bearing seals: contact seals (2RS), non-contact shields (2Z), and labyrinth seals for extreme contamination. Sizes from 6mm bore to 500mm bore. Applications: gearboxes, motors, hydraulic cylinders, agricultural equipment. Anupam Bearings stocks a comprehensive seal range.

title: Bearing Pullers and Induction Heaters
content: Bearing pullers: mechanical two and three-arm pullers for bearing removal without shaft damage. Hydraulic pullers for heavy-duty bearing removal (up to 100-tonne pulling force). Internal pullers for bearings seated in housings. Induction bearing heaters: electric induction heaters for safe, fast, and damage-free bearing mounting. No open flame required. Temperatures controlled to 110°C maximum to prevent bearing tempering. Models from tabletop units for small bearings to floor-standing models for large bore bearings. Reduces mounting time by 80% compared to oil bath heating. Available from Anupam Bearings.

title: Industrial Greases
content: Industrial greases for bearing and machinery lubrication. Types: general purpose lithium grease (NLGI 2, -20°C to +130°C), high-temperature grease (polyurea or calcium sulphonate, up to 200°C), extreme pressure (EP) grease with molybdenum disulphide or graphite additives for heavy loads, food-grade grease (NSF H1 approved) for food processing equipment, marine grease (water-resistant for outdoor/marine applications), and electrically insulating grease for electrical connectors. Available in cartridges (400g), tubs (1kg, 5kg), and drums (18kg, 180kg). Available from Anupam Bearings.
